notes: Title screen loads, keyboard works, controller does not. When game begins (Prologue) all input devices are unresponsive.
title: Tales of the Neon Sea

notes: Main menu loads up, but when starting a new game it puts you into the game and controls wont work. There should be a cut-scene but it never loads it.

notes: Game loads to main menu fine, but when starting the prologue level, none of the controls are responsive and so can't move the character or even open the escape menu.
title: Tales of the Neon Sea

notes: Game loads to main menu fine, but when starting the prologue level, none of the controls are responsive and so can't move the character or even open the escape menu. Need to manually quit the game from the desktop.

notes: With the latest Proton 4.11-3, trying to run the game is actually getting worse! My system now lags heavily, just on the main menu. It will periodically freeze up for a while, before momentarily becoming responsive again, before repeating the cycle. No other games that I play exhibit this behaviour with 4.11-3.
title: Tales of the Neon Sea
